description:
You are an edge-computing engineer preparing an updated configuration that lets a fleet of IoT devices use all four CPU cores instead of a single core.

    Preconditions already in place:
      • The directory /home/user/iot_device/ exists.
      • Inside it there is a sub-directory named /home/user/iot_device/config/ that contains a text file called device.conf.
      • The original device.conf file contains the two lines shown below *in exactly this order* and with no other text:
            # Device Configuration
            MAX_THREADS=1
        (A terminating newline follows the second line.)

    Your task:
      1. Change the value of MAX_THREADS in /home/user/iot_device/config/device.conf from 1 to 4.  Do **not** alter the comment line or add any other lines.
      2. Create a new directory /home/user/iot_device/changes/ if it does not already exist.
      3. Inside that directory create a plain-text log file named perf_optimization.log whose single line of content must be exactly:
            Optimization applied: MAX_THREADS updated from 1 to 4

    Output-format requirements that the automated grader will check:
      • /home/user/iot_device/config/device.conf must now contain exactly:
            # Device Configuration
            MAX_THREADS=4
        and must end with a single newline character.
      • /home/user/iot_device/changes/perf_optimization.log must exist and contain precisely the text (no leading/trailing spaces, no extra newline):
            Optimization applied: MAX_THREADS updated from 1 to 4

    Hint: you can accomplish all of this with a couple of shell commands such as a stream-editor substitution, a mkdir, and a single echo redirection.  Do **not** show the commands in your answer—just execute them in the terminal session.
truth:
Initial state prepared for the agent:
      • Path: /home/user/iot_device/
      • Sub-path: /home/user/iot_device/config/
      • File: /home/user/iot_device/config/device.conf
        Contents (with trailing newline):
            # Device Configuration
            MAX_THREADS=1\n

    Expected final state after successful completion:
      1. /home/user/iot_device/config/device.conf
         Contents (with trailing newline, no extra blank lines):
             # Device Configuration
             MAX_THREADS=4\n

      2. /home/user/iot_device/changes/perf_optimization.log
         Contents (no trailing newline required, but accepted):
             Optimization applied: MAX_THREADS updated from 1 to 4

    The grading script will:
      • Check that the file device.conf exists and its SHA-256 hash matches the two-line version shown above with MAX_THREADS=4.
      • Check that perf_optimization.log exists, is a regular file, and its entire contents are identical to the required single line.

    Permissions:
      All directories will be owned by user “user” and writable by that user, so no root access is required.
